creator: understudy@understudy.net
text:
Efforts at rebuild failed.

Shibari# cd /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/libgnomeui/ && make deinstall && 
make reinstall && rehash

[bhorne@Shibari:~, 09:29 AM, Sun Sep 09]>gnucash &
[1] 9489
[bhorne@Shibari:~, 09:31 AM, Sun Sep 09]>Shared object "libogg.so.7" not 
found, required by "libbonoboui-2.so.0"
[1]+  Exit 1                  gnucash
[bhorne@Shibari:~, 09:31 AM, Sun Sep 09]>

Shibari# portmaster -r libgnomeui

[bhorne@Shibari:~, 10:09 AM, Sun Sep 09]>gnucash &
[1] 67002
[bhorne@Shibari:~, 10:09 AM, Sun Sep 09]>Shared object "libogg.so.7" not 
found, required by "libbonoboui-2.so.0"
